/cvmfs/sft.cern.ch/lcg/releases/binutils/2.40-acaab/x86_64-el9/bin/ar qc libspdlog.a CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/spdlog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/stdout_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/color_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/file_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/async.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/cfg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/bundled_fmtlib_format.cpp.o
